rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly centers on anticipated guilt and purchase justification as mechanisms of vice/virtue promotion preference, and the cited paper’s core contribution is the guilt-justification mechanism (“earning the right to indulge”) for indulgent choices. This makes the cited work a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental background mention. The DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.39.2.155.19084).
